subcodes.first_line: O ye twin birds of the gardens of the Covenant! Give thanks unto the Ever-Living, the All-Powerful, that ye are steadfast in the Covenant of His Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مرغ حدائق میثاق شکر کنید حضرت حی توانا را که ثابت بر عهد و پیمان حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
